notes: President Donald Trump endorsed Gallrein and appeared with him in Boone County.
Pete Hegseth made a final-day appearance for Gallrein in Northern Kentucky.
Rand Paul endorsed Massie; treated as a local/liberty-network support signal.
Andy Barr endorsed Gallrein; treated as a small elite-party signal.
Nate Morris endorsed Gallrein shortly after Barr; treated as a small statewide MAGA-alignment signal.
Massie emphasized outside spending and local independence in late messaging.
